name: Pizza Horns
recipeInstructions:
------------------------THIS SOUNDS LIKE A GOOD PROJ------------------------
To thaw dough, refrigerate overnight or let stand at room temperature for 2 to 3 hours. On a lightly floured surface, roll each loaf into a 10-inch circle or pat and stretch with hands until about 1/4 inch thick.
Brush the surface with oil. With a pizza cutter or sharp knife, cut each circle into 8 triangular wedges. Combine sauce, oregano, and garlic powder in a small bowl.
Spread the mixture on top of the wedges, leaving about 1/4-inch margin on each side. Sprinkle with cheeses, green pepper, and pepperoni. Roll up each triangle beginning from the wide end. Curve the ends to form crescents. Place on lightly oiled baking sheets.
Brush the tops with egg white. Sprinkle with additional oregano and/or Parmesan cheese. Bake at 450°F for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
